title: The Officers Attack
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is the officers attack.
scene: The scene follows the officers attack, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The shameful kingdom of Ryuguguuuuuuuuuuguu... is dead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He saved King Neptune from Holy !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you hear?!!!!!! Princess Shirahoshii cried out to him for help!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kyahhhh!! He was here all along?! but why?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I did not mean for you to show yourself so soon ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhhi!! What's this?! who is he talking to now?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry! We took care of things as quickly as we could!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: After all, what were the chances ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...of Luffy really staying hidden like we planned?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what you wanted, right, jimbel-chan?! The tenryubito letter!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The letter!! It's gone!! When the heck did she...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My keys to the chains are gone, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look up in the sky!! What's that?! a whale, and... a lion?!

summary: The Officers Attack. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
